StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year, SUM(volume) AS revenue FROM (SELECT n1.n_name AS supp_nation, n2.n_name AS cust_nation, YEAR(l_shipdate) AS l_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.supplier ON l_suppkey = s_suppkey INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.customer ON o_custkey = c_custkey INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.nation n1 ON s_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.nation n2 ON c_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey WHERE ((n1.n_name = 'GERMANY' AND n2.n_name = 'FRANCE') OR (n1.n_name = 'FRANCE' AND n2.n_name = 'GERMANY')) AND l_shipdate BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1996-12-31') AS shipping GROUP BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year ORDER BY supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[nation].[n_nationkey] as [n1].[n_nationkey]=[dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[supplier].[s_nationkey] AND ([dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[nation].[n_name] as [n1].[n_name]='GERMANY' AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[nation].[n_name] as [n2].[n_name]='FRANCE' OR [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[nation].[n_name] as [n1].[n_name]='FRANCE' AND [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[nation].[n_name] as [n2].[n_name]='GERMANY')
